search_queries_used: site:nice.org.uk NG185 cardiac rehabilitation progress review goals follow-up
candidate_sources_rejected: automatic diagnosis, investigation, treatment, medication, dose, procedure, referral, escalation, or discharge instructions
search snippets, landing pages, and broad source-family matches without an exact applicable section
rejection_reasons: Exercise intensity and progression require rehabilitation-team assessment.
Medicine and secondary-prevention treatment remain clinician-led.
Autonomous clinical output is outside this documentation-only research programme and was not mapped.
Only opened exact official documents and directly applicable sections were accepted as evidence.
population_applicability: Adults participating in cardiac rehabilitation after acute coronary syndrome; other rehabilitation indications require separate evidence.
setting_applicability: Structured outpatient or community cardiac rehabilitation review.
UAE_applicability: International NICE evidence requires UAE rehabilitation eligibility, exercise safety, staffing, referral, and facility-policy adaptation.
recency_verification: Current NICE NG185 source was reviewed on 2026-07-13.
superseded_check: NG185 remains current NICE guidance for this rehabilitation context.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The NICE section supports documenting participation, individualized goals, progress, exercise and education context, patient questions, and follow-up in cardiac rehabilitation after acute coronary syndrome without generating an exercise or treatment plan.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports review of investigation results and future management from discharge documentation, exercise and functional context, cardiac rehabilitation, and structured follow-up.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Lifestyle and secondary-prevention recommendations were reviewed for context, but no automatic advice or medicine content was mapped.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports clinician-documented lifestyle discussion after myocardial infarction without autonomously generating diet, activity, smoking, or weight advice.

unresolved_source_gaps: Index event, rehabilitation phase, attendance, exercise test, functional capacity, symptoms, vital signs, goals, activity, education, psychosocial status, medicines, adherence, adverse events, plan, referral, and follow-up remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
